mapper.select: select count(*) from user where username = #{username}
mapper.insert: insert into user(id, username, password, nickname, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{id},#{username},#{password},#{nickname},#{phone},#{role},#{status},#{createdAt},#{updatedAt},#{isDeleted})
mapper.select: select id, username, password, nickname, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from user where username = #{username} and password = #{password}
select id, username, nickname, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at from user where id = #{id}
select password from user where id = #{id}
